title: Pam nad oes gennych dystysgrif Acas
h1: Hawlio heb Dystysgrif Cymodi Cynnar Acas
legend: [W] Do you have a valid reason why you do not have an Acas early conciliation certificate?
p1: [W] You may be able to make a claim without an Acas certificate.
p2: [W] One of the following reasons must apply as your reason for not having an Acas certificate, including:
li1: [W] you're making a claim with another person who already has an Acas early conciliation number
li2: Nid oes gan Acas y pŵer i ddarparu cymodi cynnar ar ran o'ch hawliad neu'ch hawliad cyfan
li3: [W] the organisations or people you're making a claim against have already been in touch with Acas
li4: [W] you're making an unfair dismissal claim which contains an application for 'interim relief' - this is rare and only applies to certain reasons such as trade union activities, acting as a workers' representative or dismissal after whistleblowing
warningTxt1: [W] If you tell us the wrong exemption (or it does not apply) the tribunal might reject your claim.
insetText1: Bydd angen i chi ddarparu esemptiad yn hwyrach ymlaen fel rhan o'ch hawliad. Os nad ydych yn siŵr pa un sy'n berthnasol cysylltwch ag Acas (yn agor mewn tab newydd).

validNoAcasReason.required: Dywedwch wrthym a oes gennych reswm dilys
